scripts.deploy:prep: rm -rf .next dist-cpanel && npm run build && mkdir -p dist-cpanel && cp -rv .next dist-cpanel/ && cp -rv public dist-cpanel/ && cp -rv scripts dist-cpanel/ && cp -rv src dist-cpanel/ && cp package.json dist-cpanel/package.json && cp server.js dist-cpanel/server.js && cp firebase.json dist-cpanel/firebase.json && (cp .env dist-cpanel/.env || cp .env.local dist-cpanel/.env || echo 'No env found')
